name: Cross-Format History Chain Guard
mode: design-only — no implementation in this session

sequencing.title: Create guard module
sequencing.acceptance: TC-MOZZARELLA, TC-PEPINO, TC-GINGER-BEER pass in unit tests

sequencing.title: Wire write path
sequencing.acceptance: New invoice persists do not create cross-format delta_percent

sequencing.title: Backfill existing VL data
deliverables: Run reconcileIngredientPriceHistoryChain for all ingredients with history
sequencing.acceptance: Mozzarella delta_percent null; Pepino delta_percent null; ghost rows unchanged

sequencing.title: Document format_change semantics
deliverables: Dev comment on null delta = format_change baseline reset
Optional: log guard reason in DEV trace only

1_smallestGuardPreventingAllVLFailures.answer: Five-rule core: R1 unit family + R2 countable/weight + R3 extreme ratio (>25 with mismatch, >100 hard) + R5 preservation class + R7 beverage sanity. No schema changes.

2_codePathsNeedingGuard.answer: Write: ingredient-price-history.ts (append + prior pick), ingredient-price-history-reconcile.ts. Read: operational-intelligence-synthesis.ts, margin-alert-data.ts, operational-intelligence-view.ts.

mozzarella.mechanism: R1+R2 break chain → no +1341% delta, no OI risk/opportunity

pepino.mechanism: R3+R5 break chain → no −99.95% delta, no false opportunity

ginger_beer.mechanism: R7 blocks insert if matched; currently unmatched so latent only
ginger_beer.note: Extraction parse fix still needed for auto-match trust

items: Eliminate heuristic name-token guards for routine cases
Per-supplier Mozzarella intel without concept-level collapse
Alias memory bound to commercial contract not ingredient_id
Historical pq/base_unit per row without inference

changes: Ghost rows (14) remain — orthogonal stale DB issue
Ginger Beer remains not_trusted until parse fix
betterSupplierLine inversion: eliminated for guarded ingredients
Home dashboard mock data: unchanged (out of P0 scope)
Ghost row supplier counts: partially reduced after backfill
Stale Jun 11 DB: unchanged — needs VL re-read
remainingBlockers: P1 pack variants for full supplier intel trust

unitTests: TC-GINGER-BEER: insert skipped or operational blocked

risks.risk: False positives on legitimate large price hikes within same format
risks.mitigation: R3 threshold 25x only applies WITH mismatch signal; 100x hard ceiling rare in single-format

risks.risk: Read-path guard without backfill leaves stale delta_percent in DB
risks.mitigation: Step 4 reconcile backfill + read filter dual layer

risks.risk: Pepino fresh/conserva both weight — relies on R5 tokens + R3 ratio
risks.mitigation: Extend preservation token list; ratio 2118x catches even if tokens miss

risks.risk: ingredient_name on history row may not reflect invoice line wording after catalog rename
risks.mitigation: P0 uses operational price ratio as backstop; P1 persists contract_hash
